.file-embed.background: rgb(241, 239, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(248, 248, 246, 0.8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgba(248, 248, 246, 0.8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgba(248, 248, 246, 0.8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(239, 237, 236) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(241, 239, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(320deg, rgb(236, 245, 224), rgb(234, 212, 210)) no-repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% 100% padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(320deg, rgb(236, 245, 224), rgb(234, 212, 210)) no-repeat scroll 0% 0% / 100% 100% padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", maplemono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(167, 147, 118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(194, 181, 163, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(194, 181, 163, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(239, 237, 236, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(239, 237, 236, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(167, 147, 118, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(248, 248, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "??", maplemono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

pre.background: rgb(241, 239, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(241, 239, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", maplemono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

th.background: rgb(241, 239, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
